properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.updateOnStart
properties.description: Whether to run changesets from the specified file at application startup.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.updateAllOnStart
properties.description: Whether to run changesets at startup for all configured datasources.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.updateOnStartFileName
properties.description: The changelog file name to run at startup. For named datasources uses `changelog-<name>.groovy`.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.dropOnStart
properties.description: Whether to drop all database tables before auto-running migrations at startup.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.updateOnStartContexts
properties.description: Liquibase contexts to activate when running migrations at startup. Empty means all contexts.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.updateOnStartLabels
properties.description: Liquibase labels to filter changesets when running migrations at startup. Empty means all labels.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.updateOnStartDefaultSchema
properties.description: The default database schema to use when running migrations at startup.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.databaseChangeLogTableName
properties.description: The name of the Liquibase changelog tracking table.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.databaseChangeLogLockTableName
properties.description: The name of the Liquibase lock table used to prevent concurrent migrations.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.changelogFileName
properties.description: The name of the main changelog file. For named datasources uses `changelog-<name>.groovy`.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.contexts
properties.description: Comma-delimited list of Liquibase contexts to use for all operations.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.excludeObjects
properties.description: Comma-delimited list of database objects to ignore in diff and generate operations.

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.includeObjects
properties.description: Comma-delimited list of database objects to include in diff and generate operations (all others excluded).

properties.name: grails.plugin.databasemigration.skipUpdateOnStartMainClasses
properties.description: List of main class names for which startup migrations are skipped, preventing migrations when running CLI commands.
